overview: Invoice Dashboard Pro with Kashaya Theme — a full-featured invoice and quotation management app with saffron/orange branding, split SGST/CGST tax structure, editable tables, logo upload, color customization, and PDF/print export.
features: Dual SGST + CGST (9% each) auto-calculated taxes
Editable invoice and quotation tables with dynamic columns
Logo upload with resize and position controls
Color picker for header, text, and table colors
PDF export and print with clean A4 layout
